name: Pork Minestrone Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 14 1/2 ounce can diced tomatoes with Italian-style herbs, undrained
1 16 ounce package frozen bean and carrot blend
1 medium potato, peeled & cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 medium sweet potato, peeled, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 pound cooked pork roast, cut into 3/4-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Sauté onion and garlic until the onion is tender (about 5 minutes), stirring often.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Bring to a boil; reduce heat, cover, and simmer until vegetables are crisp-tender (about 15 minutes).
5. Stir in pork cubes; heat through (2-3 minutes).
6. To serve, ladle into each soup bowl; sprinkle with 1 tablespoon Parmesan cheese.
7. Yield: 5 servings (2 cups each).
